title: JSA advises GeBBS Healthcare Solutions on acquisition of RND OptimizAR
description: GeBBS Healthcare Solutions Inc. has acquired RND OptimizAR, an India-based specialised provider of RCM services for the Durable Medical Equipment and Home Medical Equipment market.JSA Advocates & Solicitors advised GeBBS Healthcare Solutions on this acquisition.The transaction was led by Anand Lakra (Partner), with support from Niharika Mepani (Partner), Ami Shah (Principal Associate), Jinay Shah (Principal Associate), Anamika Ballewar (Senior Associate), Associates Pranjal Shorey, Janh
